title: lachnopylis sphaerocephala
intro: Lachnopylis sphaerocephala, also known as the Chinese buttonbush, is a plant species that belongs to the family Cornaceae. The medicinal properties of Lachnopylis sphaerocephala include its antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Lachnopylis sphaerocephala is often used in traditional Chinese medicine and can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal properties.
